utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six of these items appear. Each one is filled with appropriate details: property includes type, bedrooms, price, location, and features; financing includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, term, fees, and documentation; legal_services includes lawyer fees, survey costs, processing fees, and total; moving_services includes cost, service level, packing/unpacking; setup_services includes utility setup cost, included utilities, and waste collection setup; total_budget includes all cost breakdowns and currency. All items are fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution describes a purchase of a 3-bedroom detached house or townhouse in Toronto priced at CAD $650,000. In the ground-truth data, the 'Family House' matches this price and description perfectly, rated 10. The financing method is a standard mortgage with 20% down and a 4.6% interest rate, matching the 'Traditional Mortgage' option with rating 9. The legal services include lawyer fees of CAD $800 and a survey cost of CAD $650, corresponding to the 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8) and 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9). The moving service cost of CAD $650 corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). The utility setup cost of CAD $340 includes electricity, water, gas, internet, phone, and smart meters—this fits the 'Premium Utilities' package (rating 9). Therefore, the items in the final property solution map to 'Family House', 'Traditional Mortgage', 'Basic Legal Package', 'Full Structural Survey', 'Standard Moving', and 'Premium Utilities'.
